tool.name: crlf_injection_tester
tool.description: Test for CRLF injection vulnerabilities in web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test for CRLF injection in URL parameters - Test for header injection via CRLF in request headers - Generate CRLF payloads for session hijacking, redirect, XSS - Analyze URLs for potential CRLF injection points

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test: Test CRLF injection in URL parameters - test_headers: Test header injection via CRLF - generate: Generate CRLF payloads - analyze: Analyze URL for injection points

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for test, test_headers, analyze.

parameter.name: param
parameter.description: Parameter name to test. Required for test action.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Payload target: header, session, redirect, xss (default: header)

parameter.name: custom_header
parameter.description: Custom header name for payload generation

parameter.name: custom_value
parameter.description: Custom header value for payload generation

returns.description: CRLF injection test results with vulnerability indicators
